summary: Iteration 66 - Payment Bug Fixes Testing Complete. All 3 critical bugs verified as FIXED. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: 'Payé' button works correctly, Johan Michelazzi excluded from late payments, Audrey Bernard has correct due date.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 payment bugs are now fixed and verified. mark-paid returns 200 with transaction_created=true. Johan Michelazzi (5 entries, 4 departed) correctly excluded from late payments. Audrey Bernard (interval_days=25, contract 2025-10-27) has due_date 2026-03-01 (not 2026-03-25).

bug_1_payer_button_500_error.description: POST /api/payments/{id}/mark-paid now returns 200 with status=paid and transaction_created=true
bug_1_payer_button_500_error.evidence: API test: mark-paid returned 200 with {status: 'paid', transaction_created: true}. Frontend: Dialog opens, Confirmer button works, payment marked as paid.
bug_1_payer_button_500_error.root_cause_fix: recalculate_month was split into route handler (with Depends) + standalone function (without Depends) so it can be called from payments.py

bug_2_johan_michelazzi_in_late_payments.description: GET /api/payments/late no longer contains Johan Michelazzi (departed member)
bug_2_johan_michelazzi_in_late_payments.evidence: API returns 72 late payments, none with 'Johan Michelazzi'. Johan has 5 member entries, 4 with past exit_dates (2025-02-28, 2025-03-25, 2025-10-31, 2025-11-30).
bug_2_johan_michelazzi_in_late_payments.root_cause_fix: Late payments endpoint now checks all member entries by name - if other entries all have past exit_dates, considers member departed

bug_3_billing_cycle_interval_days.description: Billing cycle 'interval_days' now calculates due dates from contract_signed_date correctly
bug_3_billing_cycle_interval_days.evidence: Audrey Bernard (contract 2025-10-27, interval 25 days) has due_date 2026-03-01 (NOT 2026-03-25). Calculation: 2025-10-27 + 25*6 = 2026-03-01
bug_3_billing_cycle_interval_days.root_cause_fix: interval_days now calculates from contract_signed_date + N-day intervals instead of using cycle_value as day-of-month
